page: Microsoft Azure EC2ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the ECADSv5 server family. Powered by AMD processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, positioning the server within the memory-optimized category.

The instance includes 77 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or dedicated GPU hardware.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC2ads_v5 offers a high memory density relative to its low vCPU count, making it a viable option for workloads that require significant memory footprints without demanding massive parallel processing power. This resource balance is suitable for small-scale databases, caching layers, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and lightweight data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC2ads_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the ECADSv5 family, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance includes 77 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks integrated GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile provides a cost-effective solution for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high compute core density. It is well-suited for small-scale databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring a larger memory footprint relative to processing cores.
